profiles.name: planner
profiles.purpose: Analyze requests before implementation and produce a clear spec.

profiles.name: fixer
profiles.purpose: Implement approved scope with minimal deviation and no scope creep.

profiles.name: cleaner
profiles.purpose: Read-only review for correctness, regressions, security, and maintainability risk.

profiles.name: ghost
profiles.purpose: Add pragmatic tests for meaningful behavior and regressions.

profiles.name: librarian
profiles.purpose: Assess releases, update versioning files, and prepare tags.
